steps.title: Name the sentence's role
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports what Pérez-Ramos and her team found when they studied the cave artifacts: many items were older than previously thought.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: A focuses on flint tools, B on improvements in linen, and D on discovering a city, none of which is the sentence's function. The sentence instead gives one study outcome. The answer is C.
